name: A.T. Kearney Benchmark: Flagship Business Desktop Price Tracking, Aug 2002 – Mar 2003
description: Six-date longitudinal price benchmark (Aug 20, Oct 2, Nov 8, Dec 2, Dec 17, 2002; Mar 10, 2003) tracking five flagship business desktop configurations on a standardized config (2.4 GHz P4, 256 MB DDR, 40 GB 7200 RPM HDD, CD-ROM, no monitor): Dell Optiplex GX260, Gateway E-4000 Special Deluxe, HP Compaq Evo D510 minitower (both SB and standard variants), and IBM NetVista M42 8303. Built for an A.T. Kearney consulting engagement to quantify the 7-month delta in street prices across Tier-1 vendors. Dell's price moved +$40 (+3%), Gateway +$350 (+35%), HP Compaq SB variant +$333, IBM -$20, HP standard +$196.
